creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
On 29 Apr 2000 14:17:44 GMT, okazaki@be.to wrote:

> -.Bl -literal
> -
> +.Bd -literal
>      nghook -a fxp0: divert
> -.El
> +.Ed

Even better is this, which obviates the need for awkward whitespace:

.Bd -literal -offset indent
nghook -a fxp0: divert
.Ed

Ciao,
Sheldon.
